Landing.eyebrow: Built by someone who got lost in money — and built a way out
Landing.heroSubtitle: If you've ever opened your banking app at the end of the month and had no idea where the money went — this app was built for you. Stop the cycle of "earn → spend → owe → repeat" by finally seeing what's actually happening to your money.
Landing.ctaNote: Free forever · No credit card · Your data stays yours
Landing.heroBullet1: See exactly where every baht goes — without the spreadsheet headache
Landing.heroBullet2: Get out of debt faster with AI that does the math for you
Landing.heroBullet3: Know if you're on track for retirement, or how far off you are
Landing.previewLabel: Your finances — finally in one place
Landing.painTitle: Do any of these sound like you?
Landing.painSubtitle: Most Thai households are stuck in at least one of these. You're not alone — and it's not your fault.
Landing.pain1Desc: Payday felt great. A week later you're checking your balance with dread. You can't name 5 things you spent on this month.
Landing.pain2Desc: You pay the minimum every month, but the balance barely moves. The interest is eating you alive — but the math is too scary to look at.
Landing.pain3Desc: You set a number. You blow past it. You feel guilty. You give up. The next month it happens again.
Landing.pain4Desc: End of the month: zero left. Or worse — owe more than last month. Emergency fund is still a dream.
Landing.pain5Title: 📚 "I tried Excel, I tried other apps"
Landing.pain5Desc: They wanted you to log every coffee. They didn't speak Thai. They couldn't see your full picture. You quit after 2 weeks.
Landing.pain6Desc: You know you should be saving more — but you don't know how much, or how, or where. So you don't.
Landing.founderTitle: I built Lumenfi because I was lost in the noise.
Landing.founderQuote: I watched people close to me — and myself — trapped in endless debt. Not from earning too little. From not seeing where money went, not understanding why it kept slipping, and having no plan to break free.
Landing.founderQuote2: And debt was only one corner of the chaos. Should I be investing? How do I actually save? Do I need insurance, and how much? Tax — am I missing deductions? Every question pulled me in a different direction. So many directions, no compass.
Landing.founderQuote3: That's where the name comes from. "Lumen" means light. Lumenfi is meant to be a single light in the dark — one that shows the path through the current of your money, instead of leaving you to guess.
Landing.solutionSubtitle: Three things have to happen, in order. The app makes each one easy.
Landing.sol1Title: See where the money actually goes
Landing.sol1Desc: Snap a receipt, log a payment, or import from your bank. In 30 seconds you have the truth: net worth, this month's flow, where you're leaking. No spreadsheet. No guilt.
Landing.sol2Desc: Your AI advisor connects the dots. It explains — in plain Thai — why you overspent, where your debt is bleeding you, and which 3 things would move the needle most this month.
Landing.sol3Title: Escape the debt trap on a real timeline
Landing.sol3Desc: Lumenfi computes the exact months until debt-free using Avalanche or Snowball. Shows what extra ฿500/month does. Gives you a goal, not a vague feeling.
Landing.showcaseTitle: What it looks like in practice
Landing.showcaseSubtitle: Actual screens. Real numbers. No mockups.
Landing.row1Tag: Pain: "I have no idea where I stand"
Landing.row1Title: Your entire financial life in one screen
Landing.row1Desc: Net worth, this month's flow, debt progress, financial health score — all updated as you log. No more opening 4 banking apps to mentally add it up.
Landing.row1B2: Financial health score with weak spots flagged
Landing.row1B3: "Cash runway" — how long you'd last if income stopped
Landing.row2Title: Log a transaction in 5 seconds — or snap a receipt
Landing.row2Desc: Tap category, type amount, done. Or photograph the receipt — AI fills the fields. The friction that killed your old habits is gone.
Landing.row2B1: Photo / receipt scan with AI extraction
Landing.row2B3: Link a transaction to a savings goal in one tap
Landing.row3Tag: Pain: "My credit card never goes down"
Landing.row3Title: Know exactly when you'll be debt-free
Landing.row3Desc: Every debt, every interest rate, every option laid out. Avalanche vs Snowball vs Refinance — see the months and ฿ saved for each. AI tells you if a new loan is a trap.
Landing.row3B1: Flat rate, effective rate, revolving credit — all supported
Landing.row3B3: "Should I take this loan?" AI answer with risk score
Landing.row4Title: A budget that learns from how you actually spend
Landing.row4Desc: Lumenfi looks at your last 3 months and suggests realistic numbers. Warns you the moment any category crosses 100% — not at the end of the month when it's too late.
Landing.row4B3: Pay-cycle aware (works on your salary date, not just 1-31)
Landing.row5Title: Get a real answer in 8 dimensions
Landing.row5Desc: AI advisor analyzes your numbers and tells you: how much to save for retirement, whether your insurance has gaps, what tax deductions you're missing, and the top 5 fixes — ranked by impact.
Landing.row5B1: Debt strategy · Tax savings · Retirement plan
Landing.whyTitle: Why Lumenfi, not Excel or those other apps
Landing.whySubtitle: Four things that nobody else does together.
Landing.why1Desc: Salary on the 25th? Pension on the 1st? Most apps force calendar months. Lumenfi follows YOUR cycle.
Landing.why2Title: AI that explains, not just shows
Landing.why2Desc: Not just charts. AI Advisor writes you a Thai-language report explaining what's wrong and what to do next — with your real numbers.
Landing.why3Title: Your data is locked behind RLS
Landing.why3Desc: Supabase Row-Level Security. Even Lumenfi staff cannot read your records. Or use BYO key — your AI chats never touch our servers.
Landing.why4Desc: Logging, budgets, debt, goals, investments, net worth — all free. Pay only if you want unlimited AI. No bait-and-switch.
Landing.statsTitle: What you get on day one
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need under one roof
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Stop juggling four apps. Lumenfi keeps your whole financial life in one place.
Landing.pricingTitle: Pay what fits — or stay free forever
Landing.pricingSubtitle: Free covers daily life. Pro unlocks unlimited AI.
Landing.pricingFreeB2: 5 AI chat / day + 1 AI Advisor / month
Landing.agentTitle: Are you a licensed insurance agent?
Landing.agentDesc: Lumenfi Agent Marketplace turns user insurance gaps into qualified leads. Manage prospects, send AI-drafted pitches, book meetings.
Landing.agentB1: Qualified leads routed by area + product fit
Landing.agentB2: AI-drafted sales pitch + INA report PDF
Landing.trustB1: Supabase RLS — only you can read your data
Landing.trustB2: BYO key option — your AI chats never touch our servers
Landing.faqA1: Yes. Free covers all logging, budgeting, debt, goals, investments, and net worth tracking. AI gets a daily quota (or BYO key for unlimited).
Landing.faqA2: Supabase (Postgres) in SEA-1. Every row is locked behind RLS — even Lumenfi staff can't read your records without an explicit support request.
Landing.faqA3: Built bilingually from day one. Switch with one tap. AI Advisor responds in Thai by default.
Landing.faqQ4: Can I use it on my phone?
Landing.faqA4: Install as a PWA (Add to Home Screen) from any modern browser. Works offline for basic logging, syncs when back online.
Landing.ctaFinalSubtitle: Your first transaction takes 30 seconds. Your first AI advisor report takes 60. The control comes immediately.
Landing.ctaFinalNote: 30-second signup · email + password or Google · no credit card · cancel anytime
Landing.footer: © 2026 Lumenfi · Aurum Quietus · Built with Next.js + Supabase
Landing.essenceTitle: One light. One path. All of your money.
Landing.essenceDesc: Debt, savings, investments, insurance, taxes, retirement — they're not separate problems. They're one financial life. Lumenfi is the first place in Thailand that treats them that way, with one AI that sees the whole picture and tells you where to step next.
Landing.essenceB2: Savings — know how much, where, why
Landing.essenceB3: Investments — what to buy, when, in proportion
Landing.essenceB4: Insurance — exact gaps in life, health, CI
Landing.essenceB6: Retirement — months until you can stop working

DebtCalc.title: Debt Payoff Planner
DebtCalc.subtitle: Compare Avalanche vs Snowball strategies
DebtCalc.avalancheSaves: Avalanche saves {amount} interest and finishes {months} months earlier
DebtCalc.payExtraTo: Apply extra to this debt FIRST
DebtCalc.autoLoadedFromDebts: Auto-loaded {count} debts from your records — edit if needed
DebtCalc.quickAddTitle: + Add new debt (will be saved and shown on Debts page)
DebtCalc.quickAddHint: ✓ Once saved, appears on Debts page and auto-loads into calculator
DebtCalc.singleDebtNoCompare: Only 1 debt — all strategies give the same result. Add another debt to compare
DebtCalc.strategiesEqual: With current debts, both strategies are equivalent
DebtCalc.aiAdvisorHint: AI analyzes your income/expense/debts/budgets and recommends fastest payoff — including ways to increase income and cut expenses
DebtCalc.noAiKey: AI key not set — go to AI Advisor → Settings
DebtCalc.noSnapshot: No financial data — add transactions so AI can analyze
DebtCalc.underwaterWarning: Some debts cannot be paid off — minimum < monthly interest!
DebtCalc.underwaterFix: You must increase minimum payment OR set "extra per month" to cover the shortfall, otherwise principal will never decrease
DebtCalc.ctxConsolidation: Consolidation opportunity — avg {avg}% / max {max}% — AI will analyze
DebtCalc.extraPlaceholder: Leave blank for AI to recommend
DebtCalc.extraEmptyHint: AI will calculate the optimal amount — click "Ask AI" below
DebtCalc.extraZeroHint: No extra specified — AI will recommend strategy using minimums only
